description: This email template serves as a powerful tool for activists and organizations dedicated to combating gun violence. It is skillfully crafted to inspire action and foster support for fundraising efforts aimed at making our communities safer. The template effectively communicates the urgency of addressing gun violence, underscoring the need for donations to fund initiatives that challenge the status quo and advocate for change. It is a compelling call-to-action for anyone passionate about creating a world free from the fear and devastation caused by gun-related incidents. Whether you're an activist seeking support for your cause or an organization raising funds to combat gun violence, this email template is designed to amplify your message and engage your audience in a meaningful way.
short_description: This email template is a powerful tool for activists and organizations combatting gun violence. Ideal for fundraising efforts, it communicates urgency, inspires action, and fosters support. Perfect for those advocating for safer communities.

designer.description: I design, create layouts, videos and animations. I have been working in the world of communication since 2012. I believe that feeding on cinema, music, and art is an essential source of enrichment to always give new forms to creativity.

html_data:
A BETTER AMERICA IS POSSIBLE

WE DON'T WANT

TO PLAY ANYMORE
SIGN THE PETITION

AN INTERNATIONAL COMPARISON

OF GUN-RELATED KILLING

AS % OF HOMICIDES

 

79%

USA

37%

CANADA

4%

UK

17%

AUSTRALIA

 

In 2020 alone, more than 45,000 Americans died at the end of a barrel of a gun, whether by homicide or suicide, more than any other year on record. The figure represents a 25% increase from five years prior, and a 43% increase from 2010.

READ THE ARTICLE
 

FREEDOM IS PARTICIPATION

PEACEFUL DEMONSTRATION

AGAINST GUNS.

 

WHEN?

Central Square, City 12345

 

WHERE?

JUNE 11th 2022 | 9 - 11 a.m.

SAVE THE CALENDAR
 

SHARE TO REMEMBER

UNSUBSCRIBE
